description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by a wooden picket fence, featuring a spacious yard with green lawns, trees, and a driveway. The main building includes a garage with three cars, a visible living area, and several rooms with windows and doors. There is a paved driveway leading to the garage, and a separate structure in the backyard that appears to be a gazebo or covered patio. The backyard also contains a small garden area, a table with benches, and a paved section for outdoor activities. The roof is flat and the exterior walls are painted in light colors, with some brickwork visible around the garage. The property is well-organized, with clear separations between the living area, garage, and outdoor spaces.
description: A single-story bungalow with a flat roof, fenced yard, garage, and landscaped garden with a gazebo and driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage doors, driveway, and a large fenced yard with trees and a gazebo.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, parked cars, and the side of the house with visible windows and garden features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio area, garden, and the back of the house with multiple rooms and windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garden, gazebo, and the side of the house with additional windows and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
